question: Mimic 3 more episodes and visualize my dataset.
ground_truth: This README Quick Run prompt routes first to mimic augmentation for the latest HDF5, then conversion/visualization as follow-up so the dataset can be inspected.
expected_behavior: uses the latest HDF5 recording as input
continues to conversion and LeRobot visualization when needed
reports the augmented dataset and visualizer output

question: Expand my scissor pick-and-place recording to 10 episodes with small action and state noise.
ground_truth: This README skill-table prompt routes to mimic augmentation for a scissor_pick_and_place recording.
expected_behavior: uses an existing HDF5 recording as input
expands to the requested episode count
applies small action and state noise
